overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street at night, featuring neon-lit buildings, digital billboards, and passing vehicles. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing a foggy, neon-drenched urban environment with a waterfront promenade on the left and multi-lane road on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: first vehicle passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a waterfront railing, approaching an overhead gantry structure in the distance

entered.detail: metal safety railing running along the left side of the walkway, suggesting an elevated position or waterfront edge
tall modern streetlight with bright white LED illuminating the foggy atmosphere
large illuminated pink and red neon signage on the building facade advertising commercial establishments
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the streetlights and neon signs
multi-lane road with red curb marking, wet from recent rain
large metal framework structure spanning across the road with illuminated signage panels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk street at night, walking along a waterfront promenade with a metal railing on the left. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the bright streetlights and pink neon signs covering the building on the right. In the distance, a large overhead gantry structure spans the road, while sparse vehicle traffic begins to appear on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional area under overhead gantry with commercial signage

events.description: passes underneath the large overhead gantry structure spanning the road
green van drives past on the road from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past pedestrians on the sidewalk and passing under the overhead gantry

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated white '02' signage mounted on the corner of a tall commercial building
multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements on the building facade
red and white metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the overhead gantry structure, transitioning from the initial waterfront stretch into a more commercial zone. Pedestrians appear walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk, and a green van passes by on the road. The '02' building becomes prominent on the right, covered in digital billboards, while the road is now separated by a metal barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital advertising screens

events.description: blue truck with headlights on passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the '02' building while observing the passing traffic and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: blue truck driving along the road with bright headlights illuminating the wet pavement

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisements with bright colors
faint glow of city lights visible through the fog in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along the extended stretch of the '02' building, which now features massive curved digital billboards displaying bright advertisements. The building sign moves further into the background as the camera progresses. Various vehicles including a blue truck pass by on the right, while the foggy atmosphere reveals distant city lights ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with large commercial building entrance

events.description: approaching the large building archway entrance, street widens significantly

agents.ego_description: approaching the large building complex entrance while observing the traffic and architecture

entered.detail: large multi-story building with distinctive illuminated archway entrance spanning across the road
cluster of various sized digital displays and illuminated windows on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a major building complex with a prominent illuminated archway entrance that spans across the road. The street opens up into a wider intersection area with multiple digital screens and heavy architectural details. The waterfront railing exits view as the camera turns slightly toward the building entrance, while vehicles continue to pass through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a foggy, neon-drenched cyberpunk street that evolves from a quiet waterfront promenade into a dense commercial intersection. It begins along a wet concrete sidewalk beside a metal railing, where pink neon signs and streetlights reflect off the rain-slicked ground beneath a distant overhead gantry. As the camera passes under the gantry, the environment shifts into a busier commercial zone where pedestrians appear and a green van drives past the digital billboards of the prominent 02 building. The scene then expands along a stretch of massive curved advertisements and passing blue trucks, with the foggy atmosphere gradually revealing distant city lights ahead. Finally, the waterfront railing disappears from view as the camera turns toward a wide intersection dominated by a massive illuminated archway and heavy architectural details.
